title: Hidden Warm Path
intendedTensionBeat: The frozen path looks dramatic but the correct route is readable and generous after the prior exam.
intendedReleaseBeat: Breaking the ice reveals a clean rescue path and creates a memorable extraction beat.
expectedPath: Follow the obvious frozen rescue lane, break through it cleanly, rescue the hero puppy, then finish the secondary target with low dock risk.
expectedFailMode: Wrong play is mostly inefficient; broad clearing can delay the spectacle route but should not create harsh early failure.
designNotes: Capture-friendly recovery level. Use this to make ice emotionally satisfying, not merely mechanical.
